The '''"Flash" 4''' [[Heavy blaster pistol/Legends|heavy blaster pistol]] was manufactured by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]]

==Description==
[[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.'s]] "Flash" 4 [[Heavy blaster pistol/Legends|heavy blaster pistol]] was an almost direct identical copy of [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]]' [[DL-44 heavy blaster pistol/Legends|DL-44]].<ref name="AEG" /> They both weighed 1.6 [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]],<ref name="AEG" /> had a maximum effective range of 40 [[Meter/Legends|meters]],<ref name="RASB2" /> and a [[Blaster power pack/Legends|power pack]] contained enough shots for 50 blasts. The "Flash" 4 was fitted with a [[Cautionary pulser/Legends|cautionary pulser]] grip that vibrated in the user's hand when the power pack only had five shots remaining.<ref name="AEG" /> "Flash" 4s cost between 695<ref name="RASB" /> and 750 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]],<ref name="GFT" /> with replacement power packs costing 25 credits.<ref name="AEG" />

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] preferred to carry heavy blaster pistols such as the "Flash" 4.<ref name="RASB" /> In [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]],<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] gave his [[Marriage/Legends|wife]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], a "Flash" 4 with a custom grip and lanyard ring.<ref name="PoT">''[[Planet of Twilight]]''</ref>
